title: Cuneiform Tablet #0837: Old Akkadian Ration List
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a ration list document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a ration list document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Ration List document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records ration list matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
